legal.metaTitle: Legal notice and terms of use
legal.metaDescription: Auto Dealers Guatemala is a classifieds platform that connects buyers and sellers of used vehicles in Guatemala. It is not a party to the transactions and does not sell vehicles.
legal.title: Legal notice and terms of use
legal.intro: Auto Dealers Guatemala connects buyers and sellers of used vehicles in Guatemala. The transaction is always between the parties.
legal.footer: This notice may be updated. Continued use of the platform implies acceptance of the current version.
legal.s1p1: Auto Dealers Guatemala is an online classifieds platform that connects people who want to sell a used vehicle with people interested in buying one. We enable posting listings, contact between the parties, and reference tools such as the financing simulator.
legal.s1p2: Auto Dealers Guatemala is not a dealership, does not buy or sell vehicles, and does not own the vehicles listed.
legal.s2Title: 2. The transaction is between the parties
legal.s2p1: Any negotiation, agreement, payment, delivery, transfer, or warranty related to a vehicle happens directly and exclusively between the buyer and the seller. Auto Dealers Guatemala does not take part in the transaction, does not guarantee it, and does not hold funds.
legal.s2p2: We recommend that buyers and sellers verify the other party's identity, physically inspect the vehicle, confirm the paperwork (registration, tax clearance, history), and complete the transfer before the proper authorities before handing over any money.
legal.s3p1: The information in each listing —price, condition, mileage, features, and photos— is the responsibility of whoever posts it. Auto Dealers Guatemala does not guarantee its accuracy, currency, or truthfulness.
legal.s3p2: We moderate listings to meet basic posting standards, but that review is not a mechanical inspection or a certification of the vehicle. The “verified” label, where present, refers only to the criteria described on the platform and does not replace an independent inspection.
legal.s4p1: The financing simulator and the plans shown are estimates for informational purposes. They do not constitute a credit offer or an approval commitment from Auto Dealers Guatemala or any financial institution.
legal.s4p2: The actual terms (rate, term, down payment, and requirements) are set by the financial institution when evaluating each request. Sending a request through the platform does not guarantee its approval.
legal.s5p1: We process the data you provide to operate the platform: creating your account, posting listings, sending messages between the parties, and notifying you of updates. We do not publicly expose sensitive vehicle data such as the VIN or plate number.
legal.s5p2: We do not share your information with third parties except as needed to provide the service or when required by law.
legal.s6p1: By using Auto Dealers Guatemala you agree to post truthful information, not to list vehicles that don't belong to you or whose sale is restricted, and not to use the platform for fraudulent purposes. We may pause or remove listings and suspend accounts that break these terms.
legal.s7p1: Auto Dealers Guatemala is not liable for damages arising from the relationship between buyer and seller, for the quality or condition of the vehicles, or for decisions made based on the posted information or the financing simulator. The service is provided “as is,” with no warranties about sale outcomes.
